label: connect
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 connect --solver ls_dyna
output:
[sim] connect: session ready
{
    "session_id": "lsdyna-1776153683",
    "solver": "ls_dyna",
    "mode": "meshing",
    "ui_mode": "no_gui",
    "connected_at": 1776153683.3100975,
    "run_count": 0,
    "profile": null,
    "skills": {
        "root": null,
        "index": null,
        "active_sdk_layer": null,
        "active_solver_layer": null,
        "hint": "set SIM_SKILLS_ROOT or place sim-skills/ next to sim-cli/"
    }
}

label: copy-mesh
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import shutil, os; src=r'E:\simcli\sim-skills\lsdyna\base\workflows\pydyna_pendulum\nodes.k'; dst=str(workdir / 'nodes.k'); shutil.copy(src, dst); _result = {'mesh_at': dst, 'size': os.path.getsize(dst)}

label: title
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.title = 'Pendulum 鈥?sim CLI session E2E'

label: control-cards
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.ControlTermination(endtim=11.0), kwd.ControlEnergy(hgen=2, rwen=2), kwd.ControlOutput(npopt=1, neecho=3), kwd.ControlShell(istupd=1, theory=2)])

label: database-cards
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.DatabaseBinaryD3Plot(dt=1.00), kwd.DatabaseExtentBinary(ieverp=1), kwd.DatabaseGlstat(dt=0.10), kwd.DatabaseMatsum(dt=0.10), kwd.DatabaseNodout(dt=0.10), kwd.DatabaseHistoryNode(id1=350, id2=374, id3=678, id4=713), kwd.DatabaseRbdout(dt=0.10), kwd.DatabaseRcforc(dt=0.10)])

label: contact
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.ContactAutomaticSingleSurface(ssid=0, fs=0.08, fd=0.08), kwd.ControlContact(shlthk=2)])

label: gravity-load
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import pandas as pd; curve1 = kwd.DefineCurve(lcid=1); curve1.curves = pd.DataFrame({'a1': [0.00, 10000.00], 'o1': [1.000, 1.000]}); deck.extend([kwd.LoadBodyY(lcid=1, sf=0.00981), curve1])

label: boundary-conditions
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import pandas as pd; bc = kwd.BoundarySpcNode(); bc.nodes = pd.DataFrame({'nid': [45004, 45005, 45010, 45011], 'cid': [0, 0, 0, 0], 'dofx': [1, 1, 1, 1], 'dofy': [1, 1, 1, 1], 'dofz': [1, 1, 1, 1], 'dofrx': [0, 0, 0, 0], 'dofry': [0, 0, 0, 0], 'dofrz': [0, 0, 0, 0]}); deck.append(bc)

label: initial-velocity-box
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.InitialVelocity(boxid=5, vx=0.0, vy=-12.0, vz=0.0), kwd.DefineBox(boxid=5, xmn=-120.0, xmx=-80.0, ymn=80.0, ymx=120.0, zmn=-30.0, zmx=30.0)])

label: parts
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import pandas as pd; spherePart = kwd.Part(); spherePart.parts = pd.DataFrame({'heading': ['sphere1', 'sphere2'], 'pid': [1, 2], 'secid': [1, 2], 'mid': [1, 1]}); beamPart = kwd.Part(heading='Pendulum Wires - Elastic Beams', pid=45, secid=45, mid=45); deck.extend([spherePart, beamPart])

label: materials-sections
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.MatPlasticKinematic(mid=1, ro=2.7e-6, e=68.9, pr=0.330, sigy=0.286, etan=0.00689), kwd.SectionShell(secid=1, elfrom=2, t1=1.0, t2=1.0, t3=1.0, t4=1.0), kwd.SectionShell(secid=2, elfrom=2, t1=1.0, t2=1.0, t3=1.0, t4=1.0), kwd.SectionBeam(secid=45, elform=3, shrf=1.00000, qr_irid=1.0, a=10.0), kwd.MatElastic(mid=45, ro=7.86e-6, e=210.0, pr=0.30)])

label: deformable-to-rigid
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.DeformableToRigid(pid=1), kwd.DeformableToRigid(pid=2)])

label: include-mesh
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.append(kwd.Include(filename='nodes.k'))

label: inspect-deck
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect deck.summary
output:

label: export-deck
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.export_file(str(workdir / 'pendulum.k'))

label: solve
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec run_dyna('pendulum.k', working_directory=str(workdir), stream=False)

label: inspect-files
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect workdir.files

label: inspect-results
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect results.summary

label: extract-energies
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec gke_op = dpf.operators.result.global_kinetic_energy(); gke_op.inputs.data_sources.connect(_data_sources); ke = gke_op.eval().get_field(0).data; gie_op = dpf.operators.result.global_internal_energy(); gie_op.inputs.data_sources.connect(_data_sources); ie = gie_op.eval().get_field(0).data; _result = {'n_states': len(ke), 'ke_max': float(max(ke)), 'ke_min': float(min(ke)), 'ke_final': float(ke[-1]), 'ie_max': float(max(ie)), 'ie_final': float(ie[-1])}

label: extract-displacement
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import numpy as np; disp_op = model.results.displacement.on_last_time_freq(); disp_field = disp_op.eval().get_field(0); disp_arr = np.asarray(disp_field.data).reshape(-1, 3); norms = np.linalg.norm(disp_arr, axis=1); _result = {'n_nodes': int(disp_arr.shape[0]), 'max_disp_mm': float(norms.max()), 'mean_disp_mm': float(norms.mean())}

label: extract-trajectory-meta
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import numpy as np; coord_op = model.results.coordinates; positions = []; tfs = model.metadata.time_freq_support; n = len(tfs.time_frequencies.data_as_list); _result = {'n_history_states': n}

label: disconnect
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 disconnect
